matches.label: RR vs CSK

However, your 't1' bets were placed at progressively lower odds (1.456, then 1.288, then 1.19), suggesting a rush to bet on your perceived favorite. While Bet #4 on 't2' at 14.61 odds was well-timed at 22:45:26, placing a substantial amount on 't1' at decreasing odds might have limited broader hedging opportunities for other outcomes.

For future matches, focus on establishing more balanced hedge positions on all outcomes sooner, leveraging favorable odds spikes, to maximize profit potential regardless of the final result.
